# Changelog

nodes.label: ReuseCertificate
nodes.description: The Reuse-Certificate marks the point when an asset enters a new life by using parts or components of end-of-life vehicles for the same purpose for which they were conceived, as defined by the EU proposal 2023/0284.

nodes.label: certificate
nodes.description: A property of the model, named certificate.

nodes.label: partInstanceId
nodes.description: The serial number of the part from the manufacturer
